elements.name: Prepare active Contract A and Contract B before Contract F process on Unit property

steps.name: I open the DLD login page
I select "Username" login option
I enter username "majed.1015"
I enter password "654321"
I click on "Login"
broker uses Contract F data set key "unit-18327-2019"
I cancel previous approved Contract F via support API if available
I reset contract status for certificate "18327" year "2019"
I reset Contract F status for certificate "18327" year "2019"
I land on the dashboard
I click on "Contracts" tab
I close the popup message
I click on "Create Contract A" in the left panel
I should see owner selection options
I select "Owner Person" option
I should see property validation form
I enter Certificate Number "18327"
I select Certificate Year "2019"
I select Property Type "Unit"
I select Owner Verification Type "Passport"
I select "Passport" from the list
I should see "Passport" field displayed
I enter "Passport" value "382239911"
I click on "Save & Close" button
I should see "Property Information" details screen
I select "Residential" from Usage dropdown
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Owner Details" details screen
I select "Yes" for Green List question
I click on the checkbox
I click on "I Confirm" button
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Tenancy Information" details screen
I click on tenancy confirmation checkbox
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Property Financial Information" details screen
I enter Sell Price "100000"
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Commission and Duration" details screen
I select Contract Start date 2 days from today
I select Contract End date 3 months from start date
I select Commission as paid and enter amount "20000"
I select NOC from developer as Yes
I select Seller covering marketing fee as Yes
I select Is Exclusive as No
I click on "Save & Close" button
I enter notes for testing
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see preview page with terms and conditions
I click on terms and conditions checkbox
I click on Submit Contract for Approval button
I should see success message Your contract has been submitted successfully
broker stores active Contract A number for Contract F use
broker returns to Contracts tab after approval flow for Contract F
I enter the created contract number
I click on Search button to find contract
I click on searched contract result
I open the approval link
I verify edited sell price "100000" on approval page
I verify commission "20000" on approval page
I verify contract dates on approval page
I click on terms and conditions checkbox
I click on submit button
I confirm approval on popup
I should see success message "Your signature request has been accepted successfully"
broker stores active Contract A number for Contract F use
broker returns to Contracts tab after approval flow for Contract F
broker clicks on Create Contract B
broker selects Person in contract B popup
broker selects Emirates ID as registration type in contract B popup
broker enters Emirates ID year "1986" and number "57419044" in contract B popup
broker selects Date of Birth "29/04/1971" from calendar in contract B popup
broker clicks Proceed to search in contract B popup
broker waits for Contract B search result and clicks it
broker handles response after selecting contract B search result
broker selects Yes on Green List in contract B form
broker selects passport expiry date 1 year from today in contract B form
broker selects passport type "Regular passport" in contract B form
broker selects Emirates ID expiry date 3 months from today in contract B form
broker enters mobile number "0558895363" in contract B form
broker enters email address "waqas.munir@eres.ae" in contract B form
broker selects Buyer radio in contract B form
broker accepts terms checkbox in contract B form
broker clicks Save and Continue in contract B form
broker should see Property Information screen in contract B flow
broker selects "Unit" from property type lookup in contract B property information
broker selects "Residential" from Property Usage dropdown in contract B
broker selects "Rented" from Rental Status dropdown in contract B
broker selects "Yes" for Is Freehold question in contract B
broker enters "2" for Number of Rooms in contract B
broker enters "Marsa Dubai" for Area/Community in contract B
broker clicks Save and Continue in contract B form
broker should see next section in contract B flow
broker enters budget "700000" on property financial information page in contract B
broker selects payment method "Cash" on property financial information page in contract B
broker clicks Save and Continue on Buyers Share page in contract B
broker should verify percentage of buy is "100%" in contract B
broker clicks Save and Continue on Buyers Share page in contract B
broker should see Commission and Duration screen in contract B
broker selects Contract Start Date 10 days from today in contract B
broker selects Contract End Date 2 months from Contract Start Date in contract B
broker selects "Yes" for Commission will be paid in contract B
broker enters commission amount "20000" in contract B
broker selects "Yes" for Is Buyer covering the marketing fees in contract B
broker clicks Save and Continue in contract B form
broker should see Notes page in contract B
broker enters meaningful notes in contract B
broker clicks Save and Continue on Notes page in contract B
broker should see Contract Preview page in contract B
broker clicks contract preview checkbox in contract B
broker clicks Submit Contract for Approval in contract B
broker should see Contract submitted successfully in contract B
broker stores active Contract B number for Contract F use
broker returns to Contracts tab after approval flow for Contract F
broker enters the saved Contract B number for Contract F
broker clicks on Search button to find contract B
broker clicks on searched Contract B result
broker opens Contract B approval link
broker accepts terms and conditions on Contract B approval page
broker submits Contract B approval
broker confirms approval on popup for Contract B
broker should see Contract B approval success message "Your signature request has been accepted successfully"
broker stores active Contract B number for Contract F use
broker returns to Contracts tab after approval flow for Contract F
broker enters the saved Contract A number for Contract F
I click on Search button to find contract
I click on searched contract result
broker clicks on Create Unified Sale Contract (F)
broker selects Contract B for Unified Sale Contract (F)
broker enters the saved Contract B number in Contract F prompt
broker clicks Proceed in Contract F prompt
broker should see Contract F creation form
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Owner 1 on Contract F owner details page
broker captures owner name on Contract F owner details page
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Buyer 1 on Contract F buyer details page
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Buyer's Share on Contract F page
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Tenancy Information on Contract F page
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Financial Information on Contract F page
broker enters sell price 780000 on Contract F financial page
broker enters deposit amount 78000 on Contract F financial page
broker selects saved owner name in Cheque Deposit Holder on Contract F financial page
broker selects Confiscation of security deposit as Yes on Contract F financial page
broker selects Yes for mortgage on Contract F financial page
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Payment Plan on Contract F page
broker selects Remaining amount will be paid on transaction date as Yes on Contract F payment plan page
broker enters random cheque number on Contract F payment plan page
broker selects cheque date 10 days from today on Contract F payment plan page
broker selects Abudhabi Islamic Bank as bank name on Contract F payment plan page
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Contract Information on Contract F page
broker selects Contract Start date 5 days from today on Contract F Contract Information page
broker selects Contract End Date 2 months from Start Date on Contract F Contract Information page
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Seller Broker and Buyer Broker commission page on Contract F
broker sets Seller Broker commission slider to 100% on Contract F
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see DLD Registration Fees page on Contract F
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Notes page on Contract F
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Additional Terms and Conditions page on Contract F
broker clicks Add button on Additional Terms and Conditions page on Contract F
broker enters random meaningful English text on Additional Terms and Conditions page on Contract F
broker enters random meaningful Arabic text on Additional Terms and Conditions page on Contract F
broker clicks Save and Continue in Contract F form
broker should see Contract F preview page
broker should see entered sell price deposit and contract end date on Contract F preview page
broker accepts the terms and conditions on Contract F preview page
broker clicks Submit Contract for Approval on Contract F preview page
broker should see Contract F submitted successfully message
broker stores active Contract F number for reuse

name: Contract F - Prepare Create Contract Flow on Unit Property

elements.name: Broker opens created Contract F details page for approval handling on Unit property

steps.name: I open the DLD login page
I select "Username" login option
I enter username "majed.1015"
I enter password "654321"
I click on "Login"
broker uses Contract F data set key "unit-18327-2019"
I land on the dashboard
I click on "Contracts" tab
I close the popup message
broker enters the created Contract F number
broker clicks on Search button to find contract F
broker clicks on searched Contract F result
broker should see Contract F details page with seller and buyer approval links
broker opens Seller approval link for Contract F
signatory page loads and broker clicks Get Token for Contract F
broker should see searched Contract F number on signatory page
broker accepts terms and conditions on Contract F signatory page
broker submits Contract F approval
broker confirms approval on popup for Contract F
broker should see Contract F approval success message "Your request has been accepted successfully. Waiting for other parties to complete their signatures."
broker returns to Contract F details tab and verifies seller approval date is today
broker opens Buyer approval link for Contract F
signatory page loads and broker clicks Get Token for Contract F
broker should see searched Contract F number on signatory page
broker accepts terms and conditions on Contract F signatory page
broker submits Contract F approval
broker confirms approval on popup for Contract F
broker should see Contract F approval success message "Your request has been accepted successfully. All parties have completed their signatures."
broker refreshes Contract F details page again
broker closes popup message on Contract F details page
broker verifies Contract F number on details page
broker should see Required Documents for RT Office section on Contract F details page
broker clicks Proceed to upload button on Contract F details page
system should redirect broker to upload documents screen for Contract F
broker scans required documents count and locators on upload documents screen for Contract F
broker uploads different sample documents and enters titles on upload documents screen for Contract F
broker clicks Activate button on upload documents screen for Contract F
upload activation page loads and broker closes popup message for Contract F

name: Contract F - Open Contract Details for Approval on Unit Property
